'''Regg Kuuga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Draag]] who was wanted by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] for stealing medical [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], scrapping parts, and transforming them into tourist-attacking melee [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Regg Kuuga was worth 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,250 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
